get.description: Retrieves the event poster image

post.description: Uploads or updates the event poster image (hosts only)

delete.description: Deletes the event poster image (hosts only)

get.description: Downloads an event photo file (with access control)

delete.description: Deletes a photo from an event's album (uploader or hosts only)

head.description: Downloads an event photo file (with access control)

get.description: Downloads an event file

delete.description: Removes a file from an event (hosts only)

get.description: 302-redirects to a presigned variant (thumbnail/etc.) of an event file, or 204 when no image preview exists

head.description: 302-redirects to a presigned variant (thumbnail/etc.) of an event file, or 204 when no image preview exists

get.description: Retrieves a file by its fileId

head.description: Retrieves a file by its fileId

get.description: MED-05 — 302-redirects to a short-lived presigned URL for the requested per-size media variant (THUMBNAIL/SMALL/MEDIUM image WebP, or STREAM transcoded video). Authorization mirrors the file download (owner-OR-PUBLIC, deny-by-default). If the requested size is not yet generated, redirects to the nearest larger ready variant, else the original — never a broken image (D-04). The backend never proxies variant bytes (D-03).

head.description: MED-05 — 302-redirects to a short-lived presigned URL for the requested per-size media variant (THUMBNAIL/SMALL/MEDIUM image WebP, or STREAM transcoded video). Authorization mirrors the file download (owner-OR-PUBLIC, deny-by-default). If the requested size is not yet generated, redirects to the nearest larger ready variant, else the original — never a broken image (D-04). The backend never proxies variant bytes (D-03).

put.summary: Upsert the caller's own speaker profile

put.summary: Upsert the caller's own photographer profile

get.description: BRAND-01 — returns the org default branding (colors/font/logo/watermark). A caller who is not an org admin is rejected 403.

put.description: BRAND-01/03 — sets/replaces the org default branding. Bean-validated (hex colors, length/opacity bounds); a non-org-admin is rejected 403; a cross-aggregate logo/watermark file reference is rejected 400.

delete.description: Deactivates a notification template

put.description: Enable or disable push notifications for the authenticated user

get.description: Get detailed notification preferences for all notification types

put.description: Update notification preference for a specific notification type

get.description: Retrieves an event by its ID with all related data. Public events are readable without authentication so SSR, Open Graph link previews, and search engines can index them. PRIVATE events return 404 for anonymous callers.

404.description: Event not found or PRIVATE without access

delete.description: Deletes an event by its ID (hosts only)

put.summary: Set org event visibility (publish/unpublish to consumer surfaces)
put.description: Toggles an org event's visibility (ORG_INTERNAL/PUBLIC). Org Admin/Coordinator only; B2C (non-org) events are rejected.
Updates event privacy and sharing settings (hosts only). Can toggle public join and regenerate invite token.

put.summary: Stream one upload part (raw octet-stream, never buffered)

put.description: Updates the access level of a photo (uploader only)

get.description: BRAND-03 — returns the RESOLVED branding for the event (event override layered over the org default). A caller who cannot manage the org event is rejected 403; a missing event is rejected 404.

put.description: BRAND-03 — sets/replaces the event-level branding override. Bean-validated (hex colors, length/opacity bounds); a caller who cannot manage the org event is rejected 403; a missing event is rejected 404.
Rejects a pending attendee (removes from attendee list). Hosts only.
Approves a pending attendee (changes status from INVITED to GOING). Hosts only.

put.description: Updates an existing capsule by its ID

post.summary: Link an SSO identity to my account (LINK-04)
post.description: Validates provider ID token and attaches identity to authenticated user. 409 if already linked.

delete.description: Server ensures at least one login method (phone or another SSO) remains. 409 if attempting to remove the last method.

409.description: Cannot unlink the last login method

post.description: Allows the user to upload or change their avatar

Cancels deletion if invoked within the 30-day grace period. Reverts user status to ACTIVE, re-enables the Keycloak user, restores capsules previously soft-deleted by the deletion flow (capsules the user manually deleted before requesting account deletion stay deleted). Cancelled events are NOT restored (D-10 — irreversible; attendees were already notified). Returns 410 GONE once the grace period has elapsed.

410.description: Grace period (30 days) has expired — account cannot be restored

post.description: Mobile invite picker: client sends up to 500 phone numbers from the on-device address book, server returns the subset that already maps to active Memolink users. The remaining un-matched numbers stay client-side and are surfaced as 'Invite via SMS' candidates that the host shares manually through the iOS native share sheet — the backend NEVER sends an SMS as part of this flow.
Allows the user to change their password
Allows the user to change their profile information

post.summary: Open a multipart upload (server-derived key + uploadId; returns partSize/partCount)

400.description: Declared size outside the multipart band / unclassifiable type

403.description: Caller does not own the parent capsule

post.summary: Complete a multipart upload (idempotent; 5 MiB pre-validate; flip to PENDING)

200.description: File finalized to PENDING (or the existing contract on replay)

400.description: Sub-5-MiB non-last part / invalid or missing part

403.description: Caller does not own the parent capsule

post.summary: Request a direct single-PUT upload grant (server-derived key; bytes never transit Java)

200.description: Presigned PUT + server-generated fileId + expiry + byte ceiling

403.description: Caller does not own the parent

post.summary: Finalize a direct upload (HEAD-verify + flip to PENDING; no bytes transit Java)

200.description: File finalized to PENDING; validate/moderation enqueued

400.description: Uploaded body exceeds the declared size (FAILED + deleted)

403.description: Caller does not own the parent

404.description: File not found / object never uploaded

post.summary: Upload the caller's speaker profile photo

post.description: DELIV-03 — BCrypt-verifies the password for a PASSWORD gallery (rate-limited 5/min) and, on success, mints a multi-use 30-minute unlock token scoped to the gallery. Wrong password → 401; unpublished/deleted/expired → 410.

post.summary: Upload the caller's photographer profile photo

get.summary: List the caller's own availability windows

post.summary: Add an availability window for the caller

Email-targeted or user-targeted with a role
BRAND-04 — uploads/replaces the org watermark image (Tika-detected image/*, decompression-bomb-guarded). A non-image/oversized upload is rejected 400; a non-org-admin is rejected 403.

get.description: BRAND-02 — lists the org's named, reusable branding templates. A non-org-admin is rejected 403.

post.description: BRAND-02 — creates a named, org-scoped reusable branding template. Bean-validated (non-blank name + cascaded attribute bounds); a non-org-admin is rejected 403.

BRAND-02 — value-copies (snapshots) a template into the org default or an event override row. target=EVENT requires a non-blank eventId (400 otherwise); a cross-org template/event reference is rejected (403/404); a non-org-admin is rejected 403.
BRAND-01 — uploads/replaces the org logo image (Tika-detected image/*, decompression-bomb-guarded). A non-image/oversized upload is rejected 400; a non-org-admin is rejected 403.

Changes the org's tier via the swappable PaymentService stub (NO live charge this milestone) then upserts org_subscription and returns the updated billing view. Gated by requireOrgAdmin (admin only) inside the service, BEFORE any payment/upsert.
Accept by token — distinct route from event-join

get.description: Retrieves all active notification templates

post.description: Creates a new notification template with optional action buttons
Registers a device token for receiving push notifications

404.description: Person or capsule not in caller's graph

200.description: Grounded hits, or a clarification request

get.description: DELIV-03 — lists the invite allow-list emails of an INVITE_ONLY gallery (plain array under $.data). A caller who cannot manage the gallery's event is rejected 403.

post.description: DELIV-03 — adds an email to an INVITE_ONLY gallery's allow-list (case-insensitive). Bean-validated email; a caller who cannot manage the gallery's event is rejected 403; a missing gallery is rejected 404.
Creates a new event with optional co-hosts
Sends an update/notification to all event attendees (hosts only, Luma-style)

post.summary: Save a session into the caller's own schedule

delete.summary: Remove a session from the caller's own schedule

post.description: Updates the user's RSVP status for an event
Uploads one or more photos/videos to an event's shared album (attendees and hosts). Use this for both single and multiple uploads.

get.description: Lists photographer assignments for an event (org admin/coordinator only). Defaults to ACTIVE only; pass includeRemoved=true to also see the soft-deleted (REMOVED) assignment history for audit purposes

post.description: Assigns an org-member photographer to an org-scoped event with optional quota + access window (org admin/coordinator only)

post.summary: Assemble the multipart upload and hand off to the photo pipeline
Open a resumable upload session for an event photo

post.description: Flips ALL the assigned photographer's DRAFT photos for the event to DELIVERED, so they surface in the event album under the existing access levels + NSFW moderation (moderation is never bypassed). A non-assigned user is rejected 403. After the flip a best-effort push notifies the organizer.

Bulk-uploads photos as an assigned photographer. Each photo is staged DRAFT (invisible to attendees until delivered). Enforces the assigned shoot quota + access window with typed rejections BEFORE any blob is written; a non-assigned user is rejected 403. The existing attendee batch endpoint is unchanged.

post.summary: Tag a person on my event

404.description: Person or event not in caller's graph

404.description: Person or event not in caller's graph

Invites a user to attend an event (hosts only)
Adds a co-host to an event (hosts only)

get.description: DELIV-01 — lists the delivery galleries of an event (plain array under $.data). A caller who cannot manage the org event is rejected 403.

post.description: DELIV-01..05 — creates a delivery gallery for an event from its curation-eligible media. Bean-validated (title length, required shareType, password/quality bounds); a caller who cannot manage the org event is rejected 403; a missing event is rejected 404.
Uploads a file to an event (hosts only)

CUR-03 — applies an editorial action (APPROVE/REJECT/FEATURE) to a selection of photos ALL-OR-NOTHING: any id not belonging to the event aborts the whole request with zero rows changed (404). REJECT requires a non-empty reason (400). A caller who cannot manage the org event is rejected 403.
Scans an attendee's QR code and checks them in (hosts only)
Cancels an event with a reason and notifies all attendees (hosts only)

AIEV2-02 — atomically persists the confirmed agenda suggestion (→ conference agenda) and/or accent color (→ event branding MERGE). Either sub-payload may be absent. A caller who cannot manage the org event is rejected 403; a missing event is rejected 404; an invalid accent hex / blank session is rejected 400.
Join an event using invite link token. User-friendly flow for new and existing users.
Submit a public event for admin approval. Requires host role.

delete.description: Remove a submitted/approved event from Discovery. Requires host role.

post.description: Report an event for spam, inappropriate content, etc.
Creates a new capsule

post.summary: Attempt to unlock a capsule from the user's current location

post.description: Adds file to an existing capsule by its capsuleId

get.summary: Get the anchor metadata + asset URLs for the capsule

post.summary: Upload AR anchor (worldMap + reference image) for the capsule
Report a witness encounter (Presence Engine Layer 6)

post.description: MOD-10 — the file OWNER appeals a BLOCKED capsule file, transitioning it BLOCKED → APPEAL_PENDING and routing it into the admin review queue. One appeal per file: an asset already APPEAL_PENDING or BLOCKED_FINAL (terminal) is rejected. Only the owner may appeal their own file.

409.description: File is not in an appealable state

post.description: Verifies the phone number of the user
Checks if the user is a new user or an existing user
Validates Google ID token (JWKS + iss + aud + email_verified), creates or looks up the user, returns Memolink JWT pair. Skips SMS OTP gate. appleFirstName/appleLastName are ignored.

Validates Apple ID token (JWKS + claim checks), creates or looks up the user, returns Memolink JWT pair. Skips SMS OTP gate. Mobile MUST forward appleFirstName/appleLastName on FIRST authorization only.
Resets the user's password using the provided OTP
Registers a new user in the system
Refreshes the authentication token for the user
Sends an OTP to the user's phone number for password reset
Login an existing user
Records a deep link click event with device and context information. Can track both authenticated and anonymous clicks.
Marks a deep link click as converted when the user completes the target action. This is used to calculate conversion rates for different link types.
Manually trigger retry for a specific failed notification, bypassing the normal retry schedule

delete.description: Cancel retry attempts for a failed notification. The notification will be marked as cancelled and no further retries will be attempted.

post.description: Manually trigger processing of failed notifications due for retry. This normally runs automatically every 5 minutes.
Manually block media (ADMIN wins over AUTO)
Manually approve media (ADMIN wins over AUTO)
Resolve a user appeal: approve → APPROVED, reject → BLOCKED_FINAL (terminal)

get.description: DELIV-01 — returns the organizer detail view of a gallery (includes shareToken and invite emails). A caller who cannot manage the gallery's event is rejected 403; a missing/soft-deleted gallery is rejected 404.

delete.description: DELIV-01 — soft-deletes a gallery (the share link becomes inert → 410). A caller who cannot manage the gallery's event is rejected 403; a missing gallery is rejected 404.

patch.description: DELIV-01/04/05 — patches a gallery (title/share type/expiry/publish/download policy/password). Bean-validated; a caller who cannot manage the gallery's event is rejected 403; a missing gallery is rejected 404.

CUR-02 — sets a single photo's editorial state (PENDING/APPROVED/REJECTED/FEATURED). REJECTED requires a non-empty reason (400 otherwise). The state is written ON TOP of NSFW moderation — moderationStatus/batchState are never touched. A cross-event photoId is rejected 404 (IDOR-scoped to the event); a caller who cannot manage the org event is rejected 403.

get.description: Returns the caller's cross-event participation history (PART-02), one item per event with the user's aggregated role(s) (ORGANIZER / CO_HOST / PHOTOGRAPHER / SPEAKER / ATTENDEE / STAFF), the earliest participation timestamp, and the ATTENDEE RSVP snapshot where present. Self-scoped: the path {userId} MUST equal the caller's own id, else 403 (IDOR guard). Optional 'role' query param filters to a single role; omit it for all roles. Reads the dedicated event_participant index.
Retrieves information about the currently authenticated user

delete.description: Marks the authenticated user as PENDING_DELETION and starts the 30-day grace period. Side effects executed atomically inside a single @Transactional boundary: Keycloak user disabled + all sessions logged out, FCM device tokens deactivated, all user capsules soft-deleted, future UPCOMING events transferred to the oldest co-host or cancelled with EVENT_CANCELLED notifications fanned out to attendees. OAuth provider revoke is best-effort (feature-flagged via sso.revoke.enabled; SKIPPED_NO_TOKEN until DELETE-V2-04 lands the refresh-token column). Idempotent: a second DELETE on an already-PENDING_DELETION user returns 409.

get.description: Returns { status, requestedAt, purgeAt }. purgeAt = requestedAt + 30 days when status == PENDING_DELETION; null otherwise. Used by mobile to decide whether to render the restore prompt on app launch.

Returns a paginated list of users. Use the optional 'query' parameter to perform a case-insensitive substring search on first name, last name, OR phone number. When 'query' is omitted or blank, all eligible users are returned (excluding the caller and deleted users). Used by the mobile invite picker to find people to invite to an event.
Retrieves the avatar of the currently authenticated user

JSON sibling of GET /avatar/{fileId}: same DELETED-account gate, but returns {url, expiresAt} instead of a 302 so a web can render the avatar after fetching this with a Bearer token. Feed `url` into the tag's src.

get.summary: List the already-uploaded parts for resume (partCount + uploaded[])

200.description: partCount + the uploaded parts (partNumber, etag, size)

403.description: Caller does not own the parent capsule

get.summary: Mint a window of presigned part PUT URLs (lazy; each URL is short-lived)

200.description: The presigned part PUT URLs for the clamped window

403.description: Caller does not own the parent capsule

get.summary: Public read of another user's speaker profile (isPublic-gated)
Get clinician-verified crisis resources for the user locale

get.description: DELIV-02..05 — returns the public gallery metadata (title, share type, download policy, resolved branding) by shareToken; never media URLs. Unknown → 404; unpublished/deleted/expired → 410; PASSWORD without token → 401; INVITE_ONLY anonymous → 401, authed-not-invited → 403.

DELIV-02/06 — gates then lists the gallery's eligible photos (featured-first, paginated, page size capped at 100), tracking a VIEW async; never carries presigned URLs in the list (the byte endpoints do). Same 404/410/401/403 truth table.

DELIV-04/06 — gates, confirms the photo is eligible, selects the watermarked-or-plain preview, then 302-redirects to a short-TTL presigned URL; tracks a VIEW async. A missing/failed watermark NEVER 4xx/5xx. Locked/expired → 410/401/403 with no presign.

DELIV-05/06 — gates, rejects when downloads are disabled (403), selects the quality-mapped size, then 302-redirects to a short-TTL presigned URL; tracks a DOWNLOAD async. Authorize-before-presign: locked/expired/downloads-off never reach the presign.

get.summary: Public read of another user's photographer profile (isPublic-gated)
Resolve a name to a person (confidence-aware, never auto-picks)
List an org's photographers with profile summary + availability (admin/coordinator only)

get.description: Members with their roles
Resolved tier + per-dimension limits (null = unlimited) + current usage (storage/events/photographers/galleries) + remaining headroom. Gated by requireOrgAdminOrCoordinator inside the service.
Org-wide view/download/unique-visitor totals + bounded per-event breakdown, scoped to a single org. Counts only. Org authz is enforced in the service.

403.description: Caller is not an org admin/coordinator

get.description: Ranks PHOTOGRAPHERS or EVENTS by the chosen metric (DESC, bounded). Unknown entity/metric -> 400. Limit defaults to 10 and is clamped in the service.

403.description: Caller is not an org admin/coordinator

get.description: ORG-MINE-01 — the caller's memberships in non-deleted orgs (orgId/name/role + derived isAdmin/isPhotographer). Empty list when none. Lets the client discover existing orgs instead of POSTing a duplicate.

ORG-06 active-org event listing. The `X-Org-Id` header selects the active org: present + caller is a member → that org's events; absent → the personal default listing (same scope as GET /api/event/list?filter=mine). A non-member X-Org-Id → 403. Paginated via the unified 1-indexed PagedResponse envelope.
Retrieves templates for a specific notification type
Retrieves templates for a specific language
Retrieves notification statistics including total and unread counts
Retrieves notifications for the authenticated user, newest-first. Paginated (1-indexed page, size capped at 100) so a large inbox is never loaded in full.

parameters.name: unreadOnly
parameters.description: Filter to show only unread notifications

get.summary: List the caller's own saved sessions for the event

get.description: Generates a QR code for an attendee to show at check-in
JSON sibling of GET /{eventId}/poster: same gate, returns {url, expiresAt} for web tag rendering. Public (no token) like the poster 302.

MED-06 — keyset (cursor) gallery page for an event's photos. Stable, OFFSET-free pagination over the same access-filtered set as the paginated endpoint. Returns the CursorPage envelope {items, nextCursor, hasMore} — pass the opaque `nextCursor` back as `?cursor=` for the next page; omit it for the first page. Each item carries a THUMBNAIL variant URL + processingStatus so the client lazy-loads full-size on demand (MED-05/D-07). `size` defaults to 30, capped at 100. The existing offset endpoint is unchanged.
Retrieves photos from an event's album with pagination (with access filtering). Returns the unified 1-indexed PagedResponse envelope; `size` is capped at 100.

get.summary: List Photographer's Own Photos (with derived state)
get.description: Returns the assigned photographer's own photos for the event — INCLUDING DRAFT staging rows attendees never see — each with a derived per-event state (uploading/processing/draft/delivered). A non-assigned user is rejected 403.

get.summary: Resume contract: completed parts + uploaded bytes + status
Get Event Photo File presign URL
get.description: JSON sibling of GET /{eventId}/photo/{photoId}: same access control, returns {url, expiresAt} for web tag rendering.
Generates a shareable invite link for the event (hosts only). Link allows easy joining with privacy controls.
Retrieves all hosts of an event

get.summary: Get Event File Variant presign URL
get.description: JSON sibling of GET /{eventId}/file/{fileId}/variant/{size}: same authorization, returns {url, expiresAt} for web tag rendering. 204 No Content when no image preview exists (render a placeholder).
JSON sibling of GET /{eventId}/file/{fileId}: same authorization, returns {url, expiresAt} for web tag rendering.

CUR-01 — organizer curation-review list. Returns ALL non-deleted photos of the event (INCLUDING DRAFT and NSFW-BLOCKED), each item carrying BOTH the NSFW moderationStatus AND the editorialState as independent values, plus featuredRank, reason, uploader, and thumbnail. Unified 1-indexed PagedResponse envelope; `size` is capped at 100. A caller who cannot manage the org event is rejected 403.
Retrieves all pending attendees (INVITED status) waiting for host approval (hosts only)
Retrieves attendees of an event with pagination (hosts and attendees only). Returns the unified 1-indexed PagedResponse envelope; `size` is capped at 100.
Gallery views/downloads/unique-visitors, photographer contribution rollup, and RSVP/check-in attendance — counts only. Per-event authz is enforced in the service.
Searches public events with filtering and pagination. Paginated via the unified 1-indexed PagedResponse envelope; `size` is capped at 100.

Unified event listing. Use `filter` param: `mine` (default) = my events, `public` = public events, `attending` = events I'm attending, `assigned` = events I'm an active photographer on. Paginated via the unified 1-indexed PagedResponse envelope; `size` is capped at 100.
Returns available categories and cities for filtering. Names are localized based on the Accept-Language header (UZ, RU, EN).

Unified event discovery endpoint. Use 'sort' parameter to switch modes: 'upcoming' = by start date, 'popular' = by popularity, 'nearby' = by distance (requires lat/lng). Without sort, performs text/filter search.

get.summary: Issue a one-time unlock challenge nonce for the capsule

get.description: Retrieves a public list of capsules

get.summary: Find capsules near the given coordinates
get.description: Read query (XC-10): bind lat/lon/radiusM as query params; no request body.
Retrieves a paginated list of the authenticated user's MEMORY capsules (CAP-9). Page is 1-indexed; size is bounded to 100.

MED-06 — keyset (cursor) list of the caller's MEMORY capsules. Stable, OFFSET-free sibling of /list. Returns the CursorPage envelope {items, nextCursor, hasMore} — pass the opaque `nextCursor` back as `?cursor=` for the next page; omit it for the first page. Each item carries a cover-file THUMBNAIL variant URL + processingStatus so the client lazy-loads full-size on demand (MED-05/D-07). `size` defaults to 30, capped at 100. The /list offset endpoint is unchanged.
JSON sibling of GET /file/{fileId}/variant/{size}: same authorization, returns {url, expiresAt} for web tag rendering. 204 No Content when no image preview exists (render a placeholder).
JSON sibling of GET /file/{fileId}: same owner-OR-PUBLIC authorization, but returns {url, expiresAt} instead of a 302 so a web /
Retrieves deep link analytics data for the authenticated user. Shows their click history and conversion patterns.
Retrieves the top traffic sources ranked by click count. Useful for understanding which channels drive the most engagement.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of sources to return

get.description: Retrieves comprehensive analytics summary for a specified date range. Includes total clicks, conversions, top sources, and breakdown by link type.
Retrieves analytics statistics for a specific deep link type including total clicks, conversions, and conversion rate.

get.summary: Newest-first gate-verdict audit history for a user
List active crisis resources for a locale (admin audit, incl. provenance)
List crisis resources past the staleness threshold (SAFE-03b audit input)

get.description: Check how many notifications a user can still send for a specific type in the current window

get.summary: Check if user can send notification
get.description: Check if a user is currently allowed to send a notification without recording an attempt
Get statistics about failed notifications and retry status
FIFO oldest-first review queue, filterable by status + media type, keyset-paginated

delete.description: Allows the user to delete their avatar

delete.summary: Delete one of the caller's own availability windows (idempotent, self-scoped)

delete.description: Sets invite status REVOKED (audit trail)
Deletes a specific notification
Unregisters a device token to stop receiving push notifications

delete.summary: Delete one of my insights (hard-delete — narrative + provenance gone)

delete.description: DELIV-03 — removes an email from an INVITE_ONLY gallery's allow-list. A caller who cannot manage the gallery's event is rejected 403; a missing gallery is rejected 404.
Soft-removes a photographer assignment from an event (org admin/coordinator only)
Removes a co-host from an event (hosts only)
Removes an attendee from an event (hosts only)
Removes a file from an existing capsule by its capsuleId and fileId
Bypasses 30-day grace. Full purge: MinIO files + DB cascade + Keycloak user. Reason recorded in audit (180-day retention). Idempotent: 200 OK if user already absent.

400.description: Invalid request — reason is blank or exceeds 500 characters

delete.description: Reset the rate limit counter for a specific user and notification type. Use this to manually override rate limits or fix false positives.
Manually trigger cleanup of old rate limit records (older than 7 days). This normally runs automatically every hour.
Manually trigger cleanup of old succeeded and exhausted notification records. This normally runs automatically daily at 2 AM.

ReflectionConsentGrantRequestContract.description: Set the caller's reflection / content-understanding consent. Subject is the JWT — no userId field. RCN-01.

granted.description: Grant (true) or revoke (false) reflection / content-understanding processing.

termsVersion.description: Canonical reflection-consent terms version the user agreed to. A posture change bumps this and invalidates prior consent.

retentionAck.description: Acknowledges the limited transcript retention window. REQUIRED to grant.

withdrawalAck.description: Acknowledges the withdrawal / revocation-cascade path. REQUIRED to grant.

ReflectionConsentResponseContract.description: Caller's reflection / content-understanding consent state. RCN-01.

termsVersion.description: Canonical terms version captured at grant

retentionAck.description: Whether the retention window was acknowledged at grant

withdrawalAck.description: Whether the withdrawal path was acknowledged at grant

grantedAt.description: When consent was last granted (null if never granted)

revokedAt.description: When consent was last revoked (null if never revoked)

NotificationTemplateRequestContract.description: Request contract for creating/updating notification templates

title.description: Notification title with optional placeholders like {userName}

buttons.description: List of action buttons for the notification

enabled.description: Whether this notification type is enabled

pushEnabled.description: Whether push notifications are enabled for this type

emailEnabled.description: Whether email notifications are enabled for this type

inAppEnabled.description: Whether in-app notifications are enabled for this type

enabled.description: Whether this notification type is enabled

InsightConsentGrantRequestContract.description: Set the caller's generative-insights consent. Subject is the JWT — no userId field. PRIV-08.

termsVersion.description: Canonical consent terms version the user agreed to. A posture change bumps this and invalidates prior consent (D-01a).

providersDisclosed.description: Third-party AI providers disclosed to the user at grant time, stored verbatim (D-01b). Apple 5.1.2(i).

dataScopesDisclosed.description: Derived data scopes disclosed to the user at grant time (e.g. themes, transcript_text). Stored verbatim (D-01b).

termsVersion.description: Canonical terms version captured at grant

providersDisclosed.description: Third-party AI providers disclosed at grant (verbatim, D-01b)

dataScopesDisclosed.description: Derived data scopes disclosed at grant (verbatim, D-01b)

grantedAt.description: When consent was last granted (null if never granted)

revokedAt.description: When consent was last revoked (null if never revoked)

dateUpdated.description: timestamp when the event was last updated

checkedInAt.description: timestamp when the attendee was checked in

checkedInByHostUserId.description: user ID of the host who checked in the attendee

dateCreated.description: timestamp when the attendee was invited

eventHostId.description: unique identifier of the event host

dateCreated.description: timestamp when the host was added

eventPhotoId.description: unique identifier of the event photo

mediaType.description: Rich-media classification of the file (RICH-04) — lets the client render the right tile (e.g. a video play overlay vs an ). Null for legacy rows whose type was not probed.

dateCreated.description: timestamp when the photo was uploaded

thumbnailUrl.description: Thumbnail variant URL (THUMBNAIL size) — client lazy-loads full-size on demand via the variant endpoint (MED-05). Null when not populated.

smallUrl.description: Eager SMALL (640px) variant URL (MDS-03/D-08). Detail responses only (D-10). Null when the variant is not yet generated; client serves the original fileUrl.

mediumUrl.description: Eager MEDIUM (1280px) variant URL (MDS-03/D-08). Detail responses only (D-10). Null when the variant is not yet generated; client serves the original fileUrl.

streamUrl.description: Eager STREAM (canonical H.264) video URL (MDS-03/D-08). Detail responses only (D-10). Null when the transcoded variant is not yet generated / for non-video media; client serves the original fileUrl.

processingStatus.description: Derivative processing status (D-07): PENDING/READY/FAILED, or null when no variants exist (serve original).

moderationBadge.description: Owner-only localized moderation status badge (MOD-04) for a PUBLIC event photo. Null when APPROVED or for a non-owner. The raw moderation score is never exposed.

mediaType.description: Rich-media classification of the file (phase 42, RICH-04). Null for legacy rows whose type was not probed.

durationMs.description: Audio/video duration in milliseconds, or null when unavailable.

width.description: Pixel width for image/video/GIF, or null when unavailable.

height.description: Pixel height for image/video/GIF, or null when unavailable.

pageCount.description: PDF page count, or null when unavailable.

moderationBadge.description: Owner-only localized moderation status badge (MOD-04): a non-accusatory statement of reason on the owner's own pending/blocked content. Null when APPROVED or for a non-owner. The raw moderation score is never exposed.

blurHash.description: BlurHash placeholder for smooth gallery loading (DEL-06); a short opaque string, null until variants are generated.

thumbnailUrl.description: Eager THUMBNAIL (256px) variant URL (MDS-03/D-08). Null when the variant is not yet generated; client serves the original fileUrl.

smallUrl.description: Eager SMALL (640px) variant URL (MDS-03/D-08). Null when the variant is not yet generated; client serves the original fileUrl.

mediumUrl.description: Eager MEDIUM (1280px) variant URL (MDS-03/D-08). Null when the variant is not yet generated; client serves the original fileUrl.

streamUrl.description: Eager STREAM (canonical H.264) video URL (MDS-03/D-08). Null when the transcoded variant is not yet generated / for non-video media; client serves the original fileUrl.

processingStatus.description: Async processing state of the file (AWAITING_UPLOAD/PENDING/READY/FAILED); lets mobile show 'processing' for a direct-upload asset not yet READY.

allowJoinRequests.description: Join mode (BUG-013a): true = direct join (guest becomes GOING); false = by request (guest becomes INVITED, host must approve). The client renders 'Join' vs 'Request to Join' from this flag.

discoveryStatus.description: Public-discovery submission status of the event.

visibility.description: Whether an org-scoped event is published to consumer surfaces. ORG_INTERNAL = visible only to the owning org; PUBLIC = appears in discovery/search and is consumer-registerable. Irrelevant for B2C events (orgId null).

coverPhotoUrl.description: cover photo URL — same 3-tier fallback as the event list (poster → first moderation-visible public attendee photo → first event file); null when the event has no displayable image

photos.description: list of event photos from attendees

dateCreated.description: timestamp when the event was created

dateUpdated.description: timestamp when the event was last updated

myFileUploadMaxBytes.description: The caller's effective per-file upload byte cap FOR THIS EVENT — 500 MiB for a regular uploader, or the 50 GB ceiling for an assigned active photographer.

resumableUploadAllowed.description: Whether the caller may use the resumable large-file upload path for this event (true only for an assigned active photographer).

avatarUrl.description: URL of the user's avatar image

UpdateEventShareSettingsRequestContract.description: Request to update event sharing/privacy settings

allowJoinRequests.description: If true, users must submit a join request (host approves). If false, users join directly.

RejectAttendeeRequestContract.description: Request to reject a pending attendee

ApproveAttendeeRequestContract.description: Request to approve a pending attendee

message.description: Optional welcome message to send to the attendee

description.example: Celebrated my 30th birthday with friends and family.

location.description: location details associated with the capsule

capsuleDateOrigin.description: date and time when the capsule occurred

dateCreated.description: timestamp when the memory was created

dateUpdated.description: timestamp when the memory was last updated

files.description: list of files associated with the capsule

SsoLoginRequestContract.description: SSO login request — sends provider ID token + optional Apple name (first auth only)

idToken.description: Provider-issued ID token (Apple or Google JWT)

appleFirstName.description: Apple first name (only on first authorization; null thereafter)

appleLastName.description: Apple last name (only on first authorization; null thereafter)

email.description: Email recorded for this provider (may be null)

lastUsedAt.description: Last time this identity was used to log in (may be null)

AccountDeletionResponseContract.description: Account deletion response (returned from DELETE /api/user/me and POST /api/user/me/restore)

status.description: Current user status after the operation

requestedAt.description: When deletion was requested (null after restore)

purgeAt.description: When the account will be hard-deleted (null after restore)

MatchedContactItem.description: Single matched contact: phone number echoed back so the client can dedupe locally

phoneNumber.description: Phone number as supplied in the request (echoed for client-side join)

matched.description: Subset of phone numbers from the request that map to active Memolink users

phoneNumbers.description: Phone numbers from the user's address book, normalized to E.164 (e.g. +998901234567)

avatarUrl.description: URL of the user's avatar image

dateCreated.description: The date and time when the user was created

dateUpdated.description: The date and time when the user information was last updated

MultipartInitRequestContract.description: Request a multipart upload grant for a CAPSULE or EVENT parent. Subject is the JWT — no caller-identity field; the storage key + uploadId are server-generated and never derived from client input.

parentType.description: Whether the file attaches to a CAPSULE or an EVENT parent (D-04). Optional — defaults to CAPSULE when omitted (existing clients unaffected). EVENT selects the resumable photographer door.

parentId.description: The id of the already-created parent capsule (parent-first, D-01).

declaredSize.description: Client-declared byte size; band-routed server-side into (singlePutMaxBytes, multipartMaxBytes] (a signed part Content-Length is never trusted as enforcement).

contentType.description: Optional content-type hint (e.g. video/mp4). HINT ONLY — never used as the MIME; the worker re-derives the real type from the bytes via Tika.

filename.description: Optional original filename. Stored as metadata only — NEVER enters the storage key (the key is a server UUID, Pitfall 4).

fileType.description: Optional declared media classification; a dispatch bootstrap only (D-05) — the worker re-derives the real type and FAILs a spoofed body.

accessLevel.description: Photo access level for the EventPhotoEntity. REQUIRED only when parentType=EVENT (governs the event read gate + PUBLIC moderation); IGNORED for CAPSULE.

MultipartInitResponseContract.description: Multipart upload grant: the server-generated fileId + uploadId plus the part math (partSize, partCount). Part URLs are minted lazily by the parts endpoint — no eager array.

fileId.description: The server-generated file id; pass it back unchanged to parts/status/complete.

uploadId.description: The server-created multipart upload id; persisted on the AWAITING_UPLOAD row and re-loaded server-side (never sent in subsequent request bodies).

partSize.description: The fixed part size in bytes (the single server knob; every part except the last is exactly this size).

partCount.description: The number of parts: ceil(declaredSize / partSize).

MultipartCompleteRequestContract.description: Complete a multipart upload: pre-validate 5 MiB part-min + assemble + flip AWAITING_UPLOAD→PENDING. Subject is the JWT; only fileId + per-part (partNumber, etag) are trusted.

fileId.description: The server-generated file id returned by init; the storage key + uploadId are re-derived/re-loaded server-side (never a client-supplied key).

parts.description: The uploaded parts, each carrying its 1-based partNumber and the server-recorded ETag returned by the part PUT.

PartRef.description: A single completed multipart part: 1-based partNumber + the part's ETag.

etag.description: The server-recorded ETag of the stored part (opaque; from the part PUT response).

UploadInitRequestContract.description: Request a direct single-PUT upload grant. Subject is the JWT — no caller-identity field; the storage key is server-generated and never derived from the client filename.

parentType.description: Whether the file attaches to a CAPSULE or an EVENT parent (D-04).

parentId.description: The id of the already-created parent capsule/event (parent-first, D-01).

declaredSize.description: Client-declared byte size; re-validated against caps + the single-PUT ceiling server-side (a signed PUT Content-Length is never trusted as enforcement).

contentType.description: Optional content-type hint (e.g. video/mp4). HINT ONLY — never used as the MIME; the worker re-derives the real type from the bytes via Tika.

filename.description: Optional original filename. Stored as metadata only — NEVER enters the storage key (the key is a server UUID, Pitfall 4).

fileType.description: Optional declared media classification; a dispatch bootstrap only (D-05) — the worker re-derives the real type and FAILs a spoofed body.

accessLevel.description: Photo access level for the EventPhotoEntity. REQUIRED only when parentType=EVENT (governs the event read gate + PUBLIC moderation); IGNORED for CAPSULE (the capsule's own access level governs).

UploadInitResponseContract.description: Direct single-PUT upload grant: the server-generated fileId plus the presigned PUT URL, its expiry, and the enforced max byte ceiling.

fileId.description: The server-generated file id; pass it back unchanged to finalize.

uploadUrl.description: The presigned single-PUT URL the client uploads the raw bytes to (bytes never transit Java).

expiresAt.description: Absolute expiry of the presigned PUT; the client must complete the upload before it.

maxBytes.description: The enforced byte ceiling echoed back to the client.

UploadFinalizeRequestContract.description: Finalize a direct upload: HEAD-verify + flip AWAITING_UPLOAD→PENDING. Subject is the JWT; the only field is the server-generated fileId — no key/path/name is trusted.

fileId.description: The server-generated file id returned by init; the storage key is re-derived from it server-side (never a client-supplied key).

RegisterDeviceRequestContract.description: Request to register a device for push notifications

MemorySearchRequestContract.description: Self-scoped natural-language memory search. Subject is the JWT — no identity field.

query.description: Free-text natural-language memory query (may name a tagged person).
query.example: photos with Aziz by the lake last summer

limit.description: How many hits to return; bounded 1..100 (default 20 applied when null).

MemorySearchHitContract.description: A grounded, owner-scoped memory hit with provenance (people, source, score).

memoryId.description: The source memory id (capsule/event domain id).

people.description: Tagged person names on this memory (provenance of a person match).

sourceType.description: Which kind of memory this hit came from.

whyMatched.description: Short grounded explanation of why this memory matched.

MemorySearchResponseContract.description: Person-aware memory search result: resolved people, clarification, grounded hits.

intent.description: Always "MEMORY_SEARCH" — the parsed intent of this self-scoped query.

resolvedPeople.description: People resolved from the query's person mentions (phase-25 candidate shape).

needsClarification.description: True when a person mention was AMBIGUOUS and the caller must choose.

clarificationCandidates.description: Candidate people to disambiguate when needsClarification is true (never auto-picked).

results.description: The grounded, owner-scoped memory hits (empty when nothing matched).

dateCreated.description: timestamp when the event was created

SendEventUpdateResponseContract.description: Response after sending an event update to attendees

message.example: The event venue has been changed to Main Hall

SendEventUpdateRequestContract.description: Request to send an update to all event attendees

message.example: The event venue has been changed to Main Hall

actionUrl.description: Optional action URL for the notification

eventPhotoId.description: unique identifier of the event photo

dateCreated.description: timestamp when the photo was uploaded

BulkCurationRequestContract.description: Bulk editorial action over a selection of photos

photoIds.description: ids of the photos to act on (max 500)

reason.description: reason for the action — required (non-empty) only for REJECT

CurationPhotoResponseContract.description: Organizer curation-review item with both moderation and editorial state

eventPhotoId.description: unique identifier of the event photo

thumbnailUrl.description: thumbnail variant URL of the photo

moderationStatus.description: NSFW moderation status — INDEPENDENT of editorialState (CUR-01). Null for un-scanned/non-PUBLIC photos.

editorialState.description: Editorial curation state — INDEPENDENT of moderationStatus (CUR-01). Null for legacy/un-curated photos.

featuredRank.description: featured ordering rank (featured_rank ASC); null when not FEATURED

reason.description: reason recorded on the latest editorial transition (e.g. a REJECT reason)

dateCreated.description: timestamp when the photo was uploaded

checkedInByHostUserId.description: Host user ID who performed the check-in

qrCodeData.description: QR code data scanned from attendee's QR code (format: eventId,attendeeId,userId)

cancelledByUserId.description: User ID who cancelled the event

CancelEventRequestContract.description: Request to cancel an event with reason

reason.example: Due to unforeseen circumstances, we need to cancel this event. We apologize for any inconvenience.

description.example: Celebrated my 30th birthday with friends and family.

location.description: location details associated with the capsule

capsuleDateOrigin.description: date and time when the capsule occurred

dateCreated.description: timestamp when the memory was created

dateUpdated.description: timestamp when the memory was last updated

files.description: list of files associated with the capsule

ttl.description: Time to live for the otp in seconds

accountStatus.description: If user is in PENDING_DELETION, the current account status (mobile shows restore prompt). Null for ACTIVE / NEW_USER responses (omitted from JSON via @JsonInclude(NON_NULL)).

purgeAt.description: Scheduled hard-purge timestamp (deletionRequestedAt + 30 days). Null when status != PENDING_DELETION.

refreshExpiresIn.description: Refresh token expiration time in seconds

TrackDeepLinkClickRequestContract.description: Request for tracking deep link clicks

MarkConversionRequestContract.description: Request for marking deep link conversion

reason.description: reason for the transition — required (non-empty) only for REJECTED

EventHistoryItemResponseContract.description: A single event in the caller's cross-event participation history

event.description: Event summary (reuses the shared summary shape to avoid drift)

roles.description: The caller's aggregated ACTIVE role(s) on this event

rsvpStatus.description: ATTENDEE RSVP snapshot where present (GOING / MAYBE / NOT_GOING / INVITED), else null

participatedAt.description: When the caller FIRST participated in this event: the earliest participant-row creation timestamp across the caller's role(s) on this event. Because the index reuses the same row on a REMOVED->ACTIVE reactivation, this is the original first-touch timestamp and is NOT reset when the caller leaves and rejoins (first-participation, not last-update).

dateCreated.description: timestamp when the event was created

viewerRole.description: Caller's role on this event — host / attendee / invited / outsider. Set when the listing endpoint runs in an authenticated context so mobile clients can render the right call-to-action immediately, without waiting for the detail endpoint.

rsvpStatus.description: Caller's RSVP status when present (GOING / MAYBE / NOT_GOING / INVITED / CANCELLED).

creatorUserId.description: Userid of the event creator — lets clients infer host membership locally.

totalElements.description: Total number of elements across all pages

requestedAt.description: When deletion was requested (null if status != PENDING_DELETION)

purgeAt.description: When the account will be hard-deleted (requestedAt + 30 days). Null when status != PENDING_DELETION.

UserListItemResponseContract.description: Summary representation of a user for list / search responses

userId.description: Unique identifier of the user (UUID from Keycloak)

avatarUrl.description: URL of the user's avatar image, or null if no avatar is set

SearchUsersRequestContract.description: Request to search and list users by first name, last name, or phone number

query.description: Case-insensitive substring search on first name, last name, OR phone number. Null or blank returns all eligible users paginated.

MultipartStatusResponseContract.description: Multipart resume status: the total partCount + the parts already uploaded (partNumber, etag, size) so the client re-PUTs only the missing ones.

partCount.description: The total number of parts expected: ceil(declaredSize / partSize).

uploaded.description: The parts already uploaded, as reported by S3 ListParts.

UploadedPart.description: A single already-uploaded part: partNumber + etag + size.

etag.description: The server-recorded ETag of the stored part.

size.description: The stored part size in bytes.

MultipartPartUrlsResponseContract.description: A window of presigned part PUT URLs (windowed lazy minting; each URL is short-lived).

parts.description: The presigned part PUT URLs for the requested window, in part order.

PartUrl.description: A single presigned part PUT URL with its expiry.

url.description: The presigned PUT URL for this part (bytes never transit Java).

expiresAt.description: Absolute expiry of this presigned part URL.

SafetyResourceResponseContract.description: A clinician-verified, locale-routed crisis resource. Never LLM-generated. SAFE-03.

locale.description: Locale this resource is routed to

verifiedBy.description: Named clinician who verified the row

totalViews.description: Total gallery VIEW count across the org's events

totalDownloads.description: Total gallery DOWNLOAD count across the org's events

totalUniqueVisitors.description: Distinct visitors across the org's events (COUNT DISTINCT)

totalEvents.description: Number of the org's non-deleted events

OrgEventViewBreakdownContract.description: Lightweight per-event view-count row inside an org rollup (counts only)

views.description: Gallery VIEW count for this event

entityId.description: Entity business key (userId for PHOTOGRAPHERS, eventId for EVENTS)

entityLabel.description: Optional display label for the entity

metricValue.description: The chosen metric's count for this entity

totalElements.description: Total number of elements across all pages

body.example: John Doe uploaded a new capsule

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page, or null when there is no further page

hasMore.description: True when a further page exists (a next cursor was issued)

totalElements.description: Total number of elements across all pages

PhotographerPhotoResponseContract.description: Photographer's own per-event photo with derived delivery state (PHOTO-06)

eventPhotoId.description: unique identifier of the event photo

batchState.description: batch state of the photo (DRAFT/DELIVERED; null = legacy)

uploadBatchId.description: upload batch id grouping a single upload call

processingStatus.description: media derivative processing status (PENDING/READY/FAILED) or null

moderationStatus.description: owner-visible moderation status of the photo (owner-exempt rule)

state.description: derived per-event state returned by this endpoint: processing | draft | delivered ('uploading' is a client-side-only optimistic state, never returned here)

dateCreated.description: timestamp when the photo was uploaded

GenerateEventInviteLinkResponseContract.description: Response containing shareable event invite link

allowJoinRequests.description: Whether join requests are required (host approval needed)

totalElements.description: Total number of elements across all pages
Total number of elements across all pages

checkedIn.description: Number of attendees who checked in at the event

uniqueVisitors.description: Distinct visitors among VIEW rows (COUNT DISTINCT, never the hashes)

PhotographerContributionContract.description: Per-photographer contribution rollup for one event (counts only)

uploads.description: Total photos this user uploaded to the event

delivered.description: Of those, how many are DELIVERED

featured.description: Of those, how many are FEATURED

totalElements.description: Total number of elements across all pages

ItemOfCapsuleInfoResponseContract.description: Item of capsule information response contract

description.example: Celebrated my 30th birthday with friends and family.

location.description: location details associated with the capsule

capsuleDateOrigin.description: date and time when the capsule occurred

dateCreated.description: timestamp when the memory was created

dateUpdated.description: timestamp when the memory was last updated

files.description: list of files associated with the capsule

thumbnailUrl.description: Cover-file thumbnail variant URL (THUMBNAIL size) — client lazy-loads full-size on demand (MED-05). Null when not populated / no files.

smallUrl.description: Eager SMALL (640px) variant URL (MDS-03/D-08). Null on LIST responses (D-10: lists emit thumbnailUrl only); the client serves the original fileUrl.

mediumUrl.description: Eager MEDIUM (1280px) variant URL (MDS-03/D-08). Null on LIST responses (D-10: lists emit thumbnailUrl only); the client serves the original fileUrl.

streamUrl.description: Eager STREAM (canonical H.264) video URL (MDS-03/D-08). Null on LIST responses (D-10: lists emit thumbnailUrl only); the client serves the original fileUrl.

processingStatus.description: Cover-file processing status (D-07): PENDING/READY/FAILED, or null when no variants exist (serve original).

totalElements.description: Total number of elements across all pages

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page, or null when there is no further page

hasMore.description: True when a further page exists (a next cursor was issued)

ModerationQueueItemResponse.description: Admin moderation review-queue item (no raw score)

assetKind.description: Which media table the asset lives in

blobHash.description: Content blob hash (SHA-256) the verdict is keyed to

createdAt.description: When the asset entered the queue (FIFO ordering key)

totalElements.description: Total number of elements across all pages

EventReportResponseContract.description: Response contract for event report submission

UnregisterDeviceRequestContract.description: Request to unregister a device from push notifications

AdminDeleteUserRequestContract.description: Admin hard-delete request payload — reason is mandatory and stored in audit log

reason.description: Free-text reason for hard delete (DSAR / abuse / legal request)
reason.example: User submitted DSAR request 2026-05-15 via support@memolink.app
